summary: Engineering leader and technical co-founder with a PhD in Computer Vision from MIT and 20+ years building production AI/ML systems and platform infrastructure. Proven record leading engineering teams from 0→1 and scaling them through growth — as CTO at HomePortfolio, co-founder at Sierra Vista Group, and consulting technical lead for Fortune 500 clients including Adobe, Warner Bros. Games, and Angel Studios. Deep hands-on expertise in personalization systems, recommendation engines, vector embeddings, NLP, and ML model integration. Comfortable owning technical strategy, partnering with Product and Data, and staying close to the code.
title: Zapiers

certifications.name: AWS Solutions Architect Associate (SAA-C03, in progress)
